mano_cua.result_summary: noflo-ui图编辑器中端口连接交互异常：1)点击端口无法发起连接模式；2)拖拽端口仅导致画布平移而非创建连线；3)右键节点未弹出上下文菜单（只有画布空白处右键有菜单）。三种连接方式均无法正常工作，55步尝试均未成功建立端口连接。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Port connection interaction broken: clicking ports doesn't initiate connection mode, dragging from port to port only pans canvas instead of creating connections, right-clicking on nodes doesn't show context menu (only works on empty canvas). All 3 connection methods failed across 55 attempts.
